text_snippet: This Constitution may be cited as the Constitution of Brunei Darussalam.

article_id: 1. The remedy of judicial review is and shall not be available in Brunei Darussalam.

There shall be established a Council of Ministers (to be known in Malay as the Majlis Mesyuarat Menteri-Menteri), constituted in accordance with the provisions of this Part.
The Council of Ministers shall consist of the Prime Minister and the Ministers appointed under Clause (3) of Article 4.

article_id: 12. Tenure of office and vacation of seats
text_snippet: Subject to this Constitution, every Minister shall hold his seat in the Council of Ministers during His Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan’s pleasure.

article_id: 46. Style of laws and enacting words
text_snippet: All laws shall be styled Acts and the enacting words shall be “Be it enacted by His Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan with the advice and consent of the Legislative Council as follows:”.

article_id: 54. Right of His Majesty to address Legislative Council
text_snippet: His Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan shall have the right to address the Legislative Council at any time upon any matter.

article_id: 56. No taxation unless authorised by law
text_snippet: No tax or rate shall be levied by or for the purposes of Brunei Darussalam except by or under the authority of law.

article_id: 67. Powers and duties of Auditor General
text_snippet: 1. The accounts of Brunei Darussalam shall, subject to this Constitution and any written law, be audited and reported upon by the Auditor General, who, with his subordinate staff, shall at all times b
The Auditor General shall submit his reports to His Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan who may cause the reports to be laid before the Legislative Council.

article_id: 69. Exclusion of Muslim revenues and funds
text_snippet: The provisions of this Part shall not be applicable to Muslim revenues and funds. PART IX. PUBLIC SERVICE
His Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan may make regulations for the purposes of carrying out any provision of this Schedule.

article_id: 70. Tenure of office in public service
text_snippet: Save as otherwise provided in this Constitution, every person holding office in the public service of the Government shall hold office during His Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan’s pleasure.

article_id: 84. Effect of Constitution on His Majesty’s Prerogatives
